useCases.label: Revenue Quality
useCases.prompt: Evaluate business performance beyond top-line sales by focusing on net sales, margin quality, and revenue composition.

useCases.label: Discount Leakage
useCases.prompt: Quantify how discounts and refunds are eroding revenue and trace the impact back to products, campaigns, or customer groups.

useCases.label: Health Signals
useCases.prompt: Turn financial metrics into clear business signals, such as rising discount dependency or concentrated refund pressure.
